---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenAgora
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief, one or two sentence summary of the feature request.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who will benefit from it? Please link to any related issues or discussions.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like to see. If you have ideas about implementation, include them here.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is this one the best?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, diagrams, or references that might help us understand the request.
